name: in
docs: Declare an input stream, Optional type annotation can be provided.

name: out
docs: Declare an output stream, Optional type annotation can be provided.

name: Map.get
docs: Returns the value associated with the given key in the map, or null if the key does not exist.

name: aux
docs: Declare an auxiliary stream, Optional type annotation can be provided.

name: dynamic
docs: Permitting continual updates to the value of an expression
